headline: Is It Time To Reassess TransDigm Group (TDG) After The Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: For readers considering whether TransDigm Group at around US$1,177 per share still represents solid value or whether the recent price puts it on the expensive side, this article walks through what the numbers say. The stock has seen a 5.6% decline over the last week, a 12.1% decline over the last 30 days, and is down 13.3% year to date. However, the 3 year and 5 year returns of 93.0% and 144.6% present a very different picture for longer term holders. Recent price moves have come against a...
